description: User asks to initialize a new React project with TypeScript and Tailwind from a fresh empty repo.
user_message: Initialize a new React project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Set up the standard folder layout, ESLint, Prettier, and Vitest. Use the latest stable versions and the official Vite scaffolder.
notes: Triggers the init-project prompt plus the Latest-Compatible-First rule. No backend rules expected.
